title: Prosaptia javanica
taxonomy: Prosaptia javanica is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its unique characteristics. The classification of Prosaptia javanica is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, division - Pteridophyta, class - Polypodiopsida, order - Polypodiales, family - Lindsaeaceae, genus - Prosaptia, species - P. javanica. This classification places it within the group of lindsaeoid ferns. Further research may be necessary to confirm the classification.

intro: Prosaptia javanica, commonly known as Javanese fern, is a species of fern native to Indonesia. The health benefits of Prosaptia javanica include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
